disclaimer: This manifest is governance documentation only. entersAlphaScore=false. Not investment advice. No buy/sell/hold semantics. Paper-only. Dry-run.

phases.title: Simulation Input Readiness Mapping for Controlled Sources
phases.commitMessage: P38: Add simulation input readiness mapping for controlled sources
phases.purpose: Build a source-to-simulation-input readiness mapping classifying MonthlyRevenue, NewsEvent, FinancialReport, Chip, Quote, and Regime. Determine which sources are eligible as paper-only simulation inputs.
phases.relationshipToP49Ledger: P38 eligibility matrix is the source-of-truth for P39 contract; P49 ledger baseline includes P38 tests (55/55)
phases.relationshipToP1AxisA: P38 mapSourceToSimulationInputReadiness() is called by P1 ControlledResearchSnapshotBuilder to classify each source

phases.title: Paper Simulation Input Contract for Eligible Sources
phases.commitMessage: P39: Add paper simulation input contract for eligible sources
phases.purpose: Define the full type system and contract for eligible paper simulation inputs (MonthlyRevenue, Quote, Regime). Explicitly blocks ineligible sources. 14 forbidden fields, 8 forbidden uses.
phases.relationshipToP49Ledger: P49 baseline includes P39 (77/77). Contract block list is authoritative for subsequent phases.
phases.relationshipToP1AxisA: P39 eligible sources (MR/Quote/Regime) are the same three sources assessed by P1 ControlledResearchSnapshotBuilder

phases.title: Paper Simulation Framework Design Gate
phases.commitMessage: P40: Add paper simulation framework design gate
phases.purpose: Establish the paper simulation framework boundary / design gate / skeleton contract. Not simulation execution. Not optimizer. Not real backtest. Not scoring.
phases.relationshipToP49Ledger: P49 baseline includes P40 (118/118). Framework boundary is inherited by P41-P46.
phases.relationshipToP1AxisA: P40 establishes paper-only framework boundary that governs Axis B; P1 operates on Axis A (research snapshot), independent

phases.title: Paper Simulation Execution Dry-Run Design
phases.commitMessage: P41: Add paper simulation execution dry-run design
phases.purpose: Design paper simulation execution dry-run stub interface. NOT real simulation execution. Stub-only — no real metrics, no PnL, no ROI. executedAt=null enforced.
phases.relationshipToP49Ledger: P49 baseline includes P41 (97/97). executedAt=null invariant is a P49 ledger boundary check.
phases.relationshipToP1AxisA: Independent — P41 is Axis B stub execution; P1 Axis A snapshot is a separate surface

phases.title: Paper Simulation Dry-run Lifecycle Design
phases.commitMessage: P42: Add paper simulation dry-run lifecycle design
phases.purpose: Design paper simulation dry-run lifecycle state machine (PENDING→RUNNING→COMPLETE/CANCELLED) and immutable log. NOT real execution. All states are stub-only.
phases.relationshipToP49Ledger: P49 baseline includes P42 (98/98). State machine correctness verified by P49 full-suite run.

phases.title: Paper Simulation Dry-run Lifecycle Runner
phases.commitMessage: P43: Add paper simulation dry-run lifecycle runner
phases.purpose: Drive a P42 lifecycle through a complete stub-only run (PENDING→RUNNING→COMPLETE). Record 4 log entries. Build immutable RunnerReport. No real execution.
phases.runnerFlow: PENDING → RUNNING → COMPLETE with VALIDATION_PASSED, TRANSITION_COMPLETED x2, BOUNDARY_CHECK_PASSED
phases.relationshipToP49Ledger: P49 baseline includes P43 (98/98). Runner log structure verified by P49 full-suite run.

phases.title: Paper Simulation Dry-run Lifecycle Runner Integration
phases.commitMessage: P44: Add paper simulation dry-run lifecycle runner integration
phases.purpose: End-to-end integration surface that orchestrates the full P39→P43 pipeline in a single function call. 5-step pipeline.
phases.relationshipToP49Ledger: P49 baseline includes P44 (98/98). Integration-level governance verified.

phases.title: Paper Simulation Dry-run Integration Rehearsal
phases.commitMessage: P45: Add paper simulation dry-run integration rehearsal
phases.purpose: Meta-layer over P44: rehearses the full integration pipeline by running runDryRunIntegration (P44) and buildIntegrationReport (P44) as 2 discrete rehearsal steps.

phases.title: Paper Simulation Dry-run Full Pipeline Rehearsal
phases.commitMessage: P46: Add paper simulation dry-run full pipeline rehearsal
phases.purpose: Meta-layer over P45: rehearses the full pipeline by running runDryRunIntegrationRehearsal (P45) and buildRehearsalReport (P45) as 2 discrete full-pipeline rehearsal steps.

phases.title: Paper Simulation Dry-run Result Artifact Materialization
phases.commitMessage: P47: Add paper simulation dry-run result artifact materialization
phases.purpose: Materialize a frozen, deterministic dry-run result artifact from the full P39→P46 pipeline. Produces PaperSimulationDryRunResultArtifact with immutable snapshot semantics.
phases.relationshipToP49Ledger: P49 ledger baseline was derived from the full-suite run that confirmed P47 (and prior) chain. P47 schema-drift risk was identified as a motivation for P48.

phases.title: Paper Simulation Dry-run Result Artifact Golden Fixture Design
phases.commitMessage: P48: Add paper simulation dry-run result artifact golden fixture design
phases.purpose: Design golden fixture + validator + schema for P47 result artifact. Pins expectations deterministically. Addresses schema-drift risk identified post-P47.
phases.note: P48 self-reports 4 pre-existing failures. P49-LEDGER confirmed these as pre-existing via full-suite run (4842/4846 PASS). ledgerMatchesP48ClaimedSet=true.
phases.relationshipToP49Ledger: P48 is the HEAD at P49 ledger baseline capture. P49 ledger validates and pins P48's 4 pre-existing failure claim.
phases.relationshipToP1AxisA: P48 is the committed baseline from which P1 Axis A was implemented. P1 new files are untracked on top of P48 HEAD.

chainSummary.p1AxisAResult: 46/46 new P1 tests PASS; 221/221 affected modules PASS
chainSummary.axisAMonopolyRuleSatisfied: P1 delivered Axis A research snapshot — anti-axis-monopoly rule satisfied

manifestNote: This manifest is GOVERNANCE DOCUMENTATION ONLY. No src/, no DB, no scoring, no optimizer, no real backtest, no corpus, no simulation execution.
